title: Presentation Layer
description: Translates data formats, handles encryption, and compression.
fullExplanation: The Presentation Layer acts as a translator between the application and the network. It handles data format conversion (ASCII, EBCDIC, JPEG, MP3), encryption/decryption (TLS/SSL), and compression/decompression. This ensures that data sent from one system can be read by another, even if they use different data representations.
